clock.note: Deterministic verifier runs inject this clock; freshness math is relative to it.

mandatoryTopics.title: Electricity demand, grid capacity, reliability, rates, and generation mix
Water withdrawal/consumption, cooling, drought stress, and thermal effects
Land use, habitat, construction disturbance, materials, and e-waste
Local air pollution, backup generation, noise, traffic, and visual impacts
Employment, taxes, infrastructure investment, and economic benefits
Housing, public services, utility allocation, and opportunity costs
Environmental justice, Indigenous/local participation, siting, and governance
Variation by facility type, climate, grid, cooling design, scale, and lifecycle
Mitigation, trade-offs, policy options, disputed findings, and evidence gaps

sufficiency.insufficientTopicHandling: Report the topic explicitly insufficient with typed reason codes; never pad with unsupported prose.

diversity.sourceFamilyRule: Independence is lineage-based (shared upstream, syndication, press-release ancestry, common organizational control collapse into one family). Source count never substitutes for family count.

freshness.staleHandling: Stale sources are rejected for volatile claims with named reason freshness_expired; they may support explicitly dated historical statements only.

cycles.note: A sufficient first cycle does not force another; the golden fixture seeds a coverage gap so the deterministic controller must produce at least one follow-up cycle.

relaxationPolicy: These values are frozen at T0. Implementation lanes cannot relax them; changes require a coordinator-serialized ADR before T8.
